name: EvoPro
description: In silico evolution of high affinity protein binders with deep learning models for structure prediction and sequence design. Given binder and target sequence information, use iterative rounds of AlphaFold and ProteinMPNN to generate high-affinity binders. Experimentally validated to produce binders with Kd < 150nM for a PD-L1 antagonist.
capabilities: In silico evolution of high affinity protein binders with deep learning models for structure prediction and sequence design
Given binder and target sequence information, use iterative rounds of AlphaFold and ProteinMPNN to generate high-affinity binders
Experimentally validated to produce binders with Kd < 150nM for a PD-L1 antagonist

binderSequence.description: Amino acid sequence of the binder protein

targetSequence.description: Amino acid sequence of the target protein

numIterations.description: Number of iterative rounds of AlphaFold and ProteinMPNN optimization

numDesigns.description: Number of high-affinity binder designs to generate
